text: Allow the owner to retain exactly what was shown as an immutable attributable Report Snapshot and distinguish it from a later correction-based Restatement. Evidence [analogous plus assumption A4]: upstream immutable-history and recovery patterns support the shape; owner value must justify the added privacy and maintenance cost.
target: Retention is explicit. Every retained report has stable identity, owner action, As-of Instant, source snapshot and contract versions, formula and threshold versions, content fingerprint, and creation time; it is never overwritten, and restatement creates a linked new report.
